queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into the mitigating impact of critical account history and other existing credit obligations on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical analysis of the contribution of negative checking account balances to the determination of credit default risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the absence of a checking account as a significant driver of increased credit default probability.
